Stick your thumb upward in the universal sign for everything is great.
ql_thumbs_up.canonical: A person stands and extends the right arm forward with the hand in a fist and the thumb pointing straight up.

difficult: Bring your palm to your forehead in a classic facepalm of utter disbelief.
Slap your hand against your face as if you cannot believe what just happened.
Drop your head forward and cover your eyes with one hand in exasperation.
ql_facepalm.canonical: A person stands and brings the right palm up to the forehead, pressing it against the face while tilting the head forward slightly.

difficult: Raise both hands high in the air in a gesture of surrender.
Lift your arms above your head palms forward as if being held at gunpoint.
Throw both hands up in the universal I-give-up pose.
ql_arms_up_surrender.canonical: A person stands and raises both arms up high with the palms facing forward, holding the pose still.

difficult: Hold both hands out in front of you palms forward in a firm stop gesture.
Push your palms toward an invisible person signaling them to halt immediately.
Extend both arms and present your palms in the universal sign for do not come closer.
ql_both_hands_stop.canonical: A person stands and extends both arms straight forward with the palms facing forward and holds the position.

difficult: Roll both shoulders in big backward circles like you are loosening up before exercise.
Shrug and rotate your shoulders around in a warm-up motion.
Circle your shoulders back and around several times to release tension.
ql_roll_shoulders.canonical: A person stands and rolls both shoulders in big backward circles several times.

difficult: Tilt your head and squint as if you do not understand what you are seeing.
Cock your head to one side in obvious confusion about what is in front of you.
Lean your ear toward your shoulder while staring at something puzzling.
ql_tilt_head_confused.canonical: A person stands and tilts the head slowly to the right side while keeping the gaze fixed forward.

difficult: Dart your eyes left and right rapidly like you are looking for an escape route.
Whip your head from side to side checking every corner of the room anxiously.
Scan your surroundings with quick jerky head turns, visibly on edge.
ql_look_left_right_nervous.canonical: A person stands and turns the head quickly to the left then quickly to the right then back to center.

difficult: Walk forward with arms crossed and stomping your feet in visible frustration.
March ahead pouting with folded arms, each step a punctuation of annoyance.
Stomp forward while hugging yourself, radiating I-am-not-happy energy.
ql_walk_cross_arms_stomp.canonical: A person walks forward with both arms crossed over the chest, stomping each foot down hard with every step.

difficult: Walk forward while staring down at an invisible book in your hands, completely absorbed.
Move ahead slowly turning imaginary pages, so focused you might walk into something.
Stroll forward reading intently, oblivious to the world around you.
ql_walk_reading.canonical: A person walks forward slowly holding both hands in front at chest height with the palms facing upward, the head looking down.

difficult: Walk forward while staring at an invisible phone in your hands, thumbs typing rapidly.
Move ahead with your head down tapping at a screen that is not there.
Stroll forward completely distracted by the device in your palms, never looking up.
ql_walk_texting.canonical: A person walks forward slowly holding both hands low in front with the thumbs moving up and down quickly, the head bent down looking at the hands.

difficult: Walk forward while lifting an imaginary cup to your lips and sipping from it.
Stroll ahead taking casual sips from an invisible coffee mug.
Move forward bringing your hand to your mouth repeatedly as if drinking on the go.
ql_walk_drinking.canonical: A person walks forward slowly while lifting the right hand to the mouth, tilting the head back slightly, then lowering the hand, repeating this motion.

difficult: Walk like a soldier returning home to a heros welcome.
March forward with your chest out chin up and shoulders squared in victorious pride.
Stride ahead with the triumphant gait of someone who just won a great battle.
ql_walk_proud_soldier.canonical: A person walks forward with the chest pushed out, the shoulders pulled far back, the chin lifted high, taking long proud strides.

difficult: Walk like someone who just lost everything, head hanging and shoulders collapsed inward.
Shuffle forward with the body language of total defeat, unable to lift your gaze from the ground.
Move ahead with the crushed posture of a person who has given up completely.
ql_walk_defeated.canonical: A person walks forward very slowly with the head hanging low, both shoulders slumped far forward, the arms dangling limply.

difficult: Walk forward while craning your neck and peering around as if exploring somewhere new.
Move ahead with the wide-eyed wonder of someone seeing everything for the first time.
Stroll forward looking up down left and right taking in every detail of your surroundings.
ql_walk_curious.canonical: A person walks forward slowly while turning the head to look up, then down, then left, then right, examining the surroundings.

difficult: Walk forward narrowing your eyes and scanning every corner like a detective on a case.
Move ahead with slitted eyes, body tense, scrutinizing everything you pass.
Stride forward slowly and deliberately, your gaze sweeping side to side searching for clues.
ql_walk_suspicious.canonical: A person walks forward slowly with the head turning from side to side in slow deliberate scans, the body held alert and tense.

difficult: Walk forward with an exaggerated air of not caring about anything at all.
Stroll ahead so casually that you almost look bored, hands in pockets, gaze drifting.
Move forward with the lazy indifference of someone who has all the time in the world.
ql_walk_nonchalant.canonical: A person walks forward very slowly and casually, looking around lazily, the arms swinging in slow relaxed arcs.

difficult: Walk forward with a visible sense of satisfaction, nodding slightly as if pleased with yourself.
Stride ahead with the contented gait of someone who just accomplished something good.
Move forward with a relaxed smile in your step, body loose and at ease.
ql_walk_satisfied.canonical: A person walks forward with a relaxed upright posture, the head nodding gently, both arms swinging in easy comfortable arcs.

difficult: Climb up an invisible ladder rung by rung.
Reach up grab the next rung and pull yourself higher.
Ascend hand over hand and foot over foot.
qz_climb_ladder.canonical: A person reaches both arms up high alternately, closes each hand into a grip and pulls down, while lifting each knee up high in alternating steps.

difficult: Haul yourself up an invisible rope hand over hand.
Grip above your head pull down and lift your body upward.
Climb a dangling rope using only your arms.
qz_climb_rope.canonical: A person reaches the right arm up high closes the hand and pulls down hard, then reaches the left arm up and pulls down, repeating this pulling motion.

difficult: Swim forward through the air with alternating arm strokes.
Reach one arm forward pull back then reach the other arm forward and pull.
Stroke through invisible water with an overhand swimming motion.
qz_swim_front_crawl.canonical: A person stands and swings the right arm forward in a big circle then the left arm forward in a big circle, alternating the arm circles continuously.

difficult: Swim through the air pushing both arms outward and then together.
Extend both hands forward part them to the sides and sweep them back together.
Move your arms in the wide circular pattern of a breaststroke swimmer.
qz_swim_breaststroke.canonical: A person stands and extends both arms straight forward, then sweeps them out to the sides in a wide circle and brings them back together at the chest.

difficult: Swim backward through the air windmilling your arms in reverse.
Reach one arm back over your head and pull, then the other arm.
Stroke backward with alternating overhead arm circles.
qz_swim_backstroke.canonical: A person stands and swings the right arm backward in a big overhead circle then the left arm backward in a big overhead circle, alternating continuously.

difficult: Kick your legs in a flutter motion as if swimming underwater.
Move your feet up and down rapidly in tiny alternating kicks.
Flutter your legs behind you like a swimmer powering through the pool.
qz_swim_underwater_kick.canonical: A person leans the upper body forward and kicks the right foot up and down quickly in small motions then the left foot up and down, alternating rapidly.

difficult: Row an invisible boat with both hands gripping the oars together.
Pull back on imaginary oars lean forward and pull back again.
Sit and row in a rhythmic forward-and-back motion.
qz_row_boat.canonical: A person sits and reaches both arms forward together, closes both hands, and pulls them back to the chest in one strong motion, repeating several times.

difficult: Paddle a canoe switching sides with each stroke.
Dip an invisible paddle into the water on one side pull back switch to the other side and pull again.
Kneel and paddle alternating left and right strokes.
qz_paddle_canoe.canonical: A person kneels and swings both arms together from the left side back past the body, then from the right side back past the body, alternating sides.

difficult: Cast an imaginary fishing line far out over the water.
Swing your arm back and whip it forward sending an invisible lure sailing.
Flick your wrist and launch a phantom hook across the lake.
qz_cast_fishing.canonical: A person stands and swings the right arm back past the shoulder then whips it forward quickly, the wrist flicking at the end of the motion.

difficult: Reel in a big struggling fish hand over hand.
Pull back on an invisible rod and crank an imaginary reel.
Fight against a phantom catch yanking the rod tip up and reeling fast.
qz_reel_in_fish.canonical: A person stands and pulls the right arm back sharply, then makes quick circular motions with the left hand near the waist, repeating several times.

difficult: Sweep the floor with an invisible broom pushing debris forward.
Hold a long handle and sweep from side to side in wide arcs.
Push an imaginary broom ahead of you clearing the ground.
qz_sweep_broom.canonical: A person holds both hands together low in front and swings them from the right side across to the left side in wide sweeping motions.

difficult: Mop the floor with a back and forth scrubbing motion.
Push an invisible wet mop forward and pull it back repeatedly.
Scrub the ground ahead of you with wide wet strokes.
qz_mop_floor.canonical: A person holds both hands together low in front and pushes them forward then pulls them back, repeating this back-and-forth motion.

difficult: Push an invisible vacuum cleaner forward and pull it back.
Move ahead slowly pushing and pulling a phantom cleaning machine.
Guide an imaginary vacuum across the floor in straight lines.
qz_vacuum.canonical: A person holds both hands low in front and pushes them forward slowly, then pulls them back, stepping forward between each push-pull cycle.

difficult: Iron an invisible shirt on a board sweeping back and forth.
Push an imaginary hot iron across a phantom garment.
Make smooth pressing motions with your hand flat against the air.
qz_iron_clothes.canonical: A person stands and moves the right hand forward and back in smooth straight strokes with the palm facing down and flat.

difficult: Fold an invisible towel by bringing your hands together then apart.
Pick up an imaginary piece of clothing bring the corners together and smooth it flat.
Lift a phantom garment and fold it neatly in half.
qz_fold_laundry.canonical: A person stands and brings both hands together in front of the chest then moves them apart to the sides, then brings them together again.

difficult: Swing an invisible axe down hard to split a log.
Raise both hands high gripping an imaginary axe and bring it crashing down.
Lift a heavy tool overhead and split wood with one powerful downward swing.
qz_chop_wood.canonical: A person stands and raises both arms high overhead together then swings them down hard and fast stopping abruptly at waist level.

difficult: Shovel dirt from the ground and toss it to the side.
Stab an invisible spade into the earth scoop and fling the load away.
Dig in bend your knees lift and throw.
qz_shovel_dirt.canonical: A person bends the knees reaches both hands low steps on an invisible shovel with the right foot then lifts both hands up and swings them to the right side.

difficult: Rake invisible leaves toward you with long pulling motions.
Drag an imagined rake across the ground pulling debris closer.
Reach forward with both hands and scrape them back toward your body.
qz_rake_leaves.canonical: A person stands and reaches both hands forward low then pulls them straight back toward the body, repeating this pulling motion.

difficult: Punch rapidly at an invisible punching bag alternating left and right.
Throw quick jabs and crosses at a phantom heavy bag hanging before you.
Bob and weave while launching punches at an imaginary target.
qz_box_punching.canonical: A person stands with both fists up near the face and punches forward rapidly alternating the left fist then the right fist in quick succession.

difficult: Jump rope at high speed with both feet together wrists flicking fast.
Skip an invisible rope as fast as you can bouncing on the balls of your feet.
Hop rapidly in place while your hands spin an imaginary jump rope.
qz_jump_rope_fast.canonical: A person stands in place and jumps up and down quickly on both feet while both wrists make fast small circles at the sides.

difficult: Drop into a squat kick your legs back do a pushup then jump back up.
Squat down thrust your feet behind you lower your chest to the ground push up and leap.
Do an explosive burpee from standing to the floor and back to standing.
qz_burpee.canonical: A person crouches down places both hands on the ground kicks both legs straight back then pulls them back in and jumps straight up.

difficult: Drive your knees to your chest rapidly from a pushup position.
Pump your legs one at a time up toward your elbows while holding a plank.
Run in place horizontally alternating your knees forward as fast as you can.
qz_mountain_climber.canonical: A person holds both hands on the ground with the body straight and drives the right knee forward toward the chest then the left knee forward rapidly alternating.

difficult: Shuffle sideways quickly staying low like a basketball defender.
Slide to the side rapidly crossing your trailing leg behind.
Move laterally in a fast defensive crouch.
qz_side_shuffle.canonical: A person crouches low with both arms out to the sides and steps quickly to the right bringing the left foot to meet the right foot each time.

difficult: Step sideways crossing one foot behind the other in a grapevine pattern.
Do the karaoke drill stepping right cross behind step right cross in front.
Move laterally in a twisting crossover dance step.
qz_karaoke_step.canonical: A person steps the right foot to the right then crosses the left foot behind the right then steps the right foot right again then crosses the left foot in front.

difficult: March with completely stiff straight legs swinging your arms in rigid arcs.
Walk like a wind-up toy soldier, every joint moving in mechanical clicks.
Stride forward with your legs never bending at the knee and your arms swinging like pendulums.
qz_toy_soldier_march.canonical: A person walks forward keeping both legs completely straight with each step, swinging each leg from the hip, the arms swinging in short stiff arcs.

difficult: Walk like Frankensteins monster with arms straight out and stiff lurching legs.
Stomp forward rigidly with both arms extended straight ahead.
Move with the stiff-legged lurch of a reanimated creature.
qz_frankenstein_walk.canonical: A person walks forward with both arms reaching straight forward, both legs kept very stiff, the body swaying from side to side with each heavy step.

difficult: Shuffle forward with both arms reaching straight ahead like a wrapped mummy.
Drag your feet forward without bending your knees arms stretched toward your target.
Move ahead rigidly with bandaged limbs extended in front.
qz_mummy_shuffle.canonical: A person walks forward with both arms reaching straight forward, the feet sliding along the ground in short shuffling steps.

difficult: Prowl forward hunched over with arms swinging in wide low arcs like a beast.
Stalk ahead on two legs with a predatory slouch arms sweeping low.
Move forward like a lycanthrope stalking prey.
qz_werewolf_prowl.canonical: A person walks forward with the body hunched far forward, both arms swinging in very wide low arcs across the front of the body.

difficult: Walk forward eerily smooth and silent as if gliding inches above the ground.
Move ahead with the supernatural grace of the undead feet seeming to float.
Stride forward so smoothly you appear to drift rather than walk.
qz_vampire_glide.canonical: A person walks forward very slowly with the body held very tall and stiff, each step placed so smoothly that the movement appears to glide.

difficult: Stagger forward clutching your head as if the world is spinning violently.
Lurch ahead disoriented one hand on your temple the other reaching for support.
Weave forward dizzy and nauseous barely able to stay upright.
qz_stagger_dizzy.canonical: A person walks forward swaying and lurching heavily placing one hand on the side of the head, the other arm held out for balance.

difficult: Walk forward with a limp using an invisible cane in your right hand.
Hobble ahead planting an imaginary walking stick with each step.
Move forward favoring one leg while an unseen cane supports your weight.
qz_walk_cane.canonical: A person walks forward limping with the right hand held out to the side and pressing down with each right leg step, the right leg bearing less weight.

difficult: Shuffle forward pushing an invisible walker ahead of you.
Slide an unseen frame forward take two small steps then slide it again.
Move ahead slowly with the halting gait of someone using a walking frame.
qz_walk_walker.canonical: A person walks forward very slowly with both hands held forward at waist height, pushing the hands slightly ahead then taking two small shuffling steps.

difficult: Walk forward swinging both legs through as if using crutches.
Plant invisible crutches ahead of you and swing your body forward.
Move ahead with the rhythmic swing-through gait of someone on underarm crutches.
qz_walk_crutches.canonical: A person walks forward with both arms held stiff at the sides supporting weight, swinging both legs forward together between each step.

difficult: Drag yourself forward with one arm while the other arm hangs useless at your side.
Crawl ahead using only your left arm the right arm dangling broken.
Pull your body across the ground with one functional limb.
qz_crawl_injured.canonical: A person lies on the belly and pulls the body forward using only the left arm, the right arm dragging limp and motionless at the side.

difficult: Walk forward with one leg dragging completely useless behind you.
Stride ahead with the left leg while the right leg hangs limp and gets pulled along.
Move forward dragging a dead leg that cannot support any weight.
qz_walk_leg_drag.canonical: A person walks forward with the left leg stepping normally while the right leg stays straight and drags along the ground behind.

difficult: Walk forward with a visible sneer looking down your nose at everything around you.
Stride ahead with contempt written in every step and the tilt of your chin.
Move forward radiating disdain chin raised and lips curled.
qz_walk_sneer.canonical: A person walks forward with the chin lifted very high the head tilted slightly back and the shoulders pulled far back.

difficult: Walk forward trembling with every step as if approaching something unspeakably frightening.
Move ahead shaking visibly each foot placed with terrified hesitation.
Shuffle forward with the wide-eyed rigid gait of someone facing their worst fear.
qz_walk_terrified.canonical: A person walks forward very slowly with both arms held stiff at the sides, the body trembling slightly, each step small and hesitant.

difficult: Walk forward with the unstoppable determination of someone who will not be turned back.
Stride ahead jaw set eyes locked on a distant goal each step a statement of resolve.
March forward with fierce purpose nothing can distract you from your path.
qz_walk_determined.canonical: A person walks forward with long fast deliberate strides the body leaning slightly forward both arms swinging strongly.

difficult: Walk forward with a dreamy faraway look in your eyes barely aware of your surroundings.
Stroll ahead in a haze drifting slightly off course as your mind wanders.
Move forward in a pleasant daze your feet on autopilot while your thoughts are elsewhere.
qz_walk_daydreaming.canonical: A person walks forward slowly with the head tilted slightly up and to the side the arms swinging in very slow lazy arcs.

difficult: Sidestep quickly to the left as if dodging something thrown at you.
Jerk your whole body to the left in a sudden evasive motion.
Leap sideways to avoid an incoming object.
qz_dodge_left.canonical: A person stands and suddenly jumps both feet to the left side while leaning the upper body sharply to the left.

difficult: Duck down suddenly as if something just flew at your head.
Drop into a crouch instantly to avoid being hit from above.
Bob down sharply out of the path of an invisible projectile.
qz_duck_sudden.canonical: A person stands and bends both knees quickly dropping the body straight down with the head ducking low.

difficult: Raise both arms above your head to block an imaginary strike from above.
Cross your forearms over your head in a protective shield.
Guard your skull with both arms against an unseen blow.
qz_block_high.canonical: A person stands and quickly raises both arms above the head crossing the forearms and holding them firmly overhead.

difficult: Sweep your leg low across the ground as if kicking someones feet out from under them.
Execute a low spinning leg sweep just above the floor.
Whip one leg around in a low arc to trip an invisible opponent.
qz_kick_low.canonical: A person crouches slightly and swings the right leg in a wide low arc just above the ground from right to left.

difficult: Fling an invisible frisbee sideways with a sharp flick of your wrist.
Hurl a phantom disc with a sidearm snapping motion.
Launch something spinning through the air with a quick lateral throw.
qz_throw_sidearm.canonical: A person stands and swings the right arm across the body from left to right with a sharp flick of the wrist at the end.

difficult: Reach up with both hands and catch an invisible ball falling from above.
Snatch something out of the air above your head and bring it down.
Look up extend your arms and grab a phantom object before it hits the ground.
qz_catch_high.canonical: A person looks up and reaches both arms high overhead with both hands open, then closes both hands and brings them down to the chest.

difficult: Bend down and scoop up an invisible rolling ball from near your feet.
Stoop quickly and gather something from the ground with both hands.
Drop low and intercept a phantom object skimming across the floor.
qz_catch_low.canonical: A person bends the knees and reaches both hands down close to the ground, scoops the hands together and brings them up.

difficult: Dribble an invisible basketball with your right hand while walking forward.
Bounce a phantom ball at your side with each step.
Walk ahead pushing an imaginary ball down to the floor with each stride.
qz_dribble_ball.canonical: A person walks forward while pushing the right hand down toward the ground repeatedly with the palm facing down.

difficult: Toss an invisible tennis ball up and smash it with an overhead serve.
Lift one hand to release a phantom ball and swing the other arm up to strike it.
Throw something skyward and bring your racquet arm crashing down.
qz_tennis_serve.canonical: A person stands and raises the left hand up releasing something skyward then swings the right arm up and forward in a powerful overhead serving motion.

difficult: Take a smooth golf swing twisting your whole body into the follow-through.
Address an invisible ball rotate back and swing through with precision.
Plant your feet turn your hips and drive an imaginary golf ball into the distance.
qz_golf_swing.canonical: A person stands sideways with both hands held together low, twists the upper body to the right then swings both arms through to the left and up high.

difficult: Swing an invisible baseball bat level across your body with full rotation.
Grip a phantom bat plant your feet and take a mighty horizontal swing.
Twist your hips and shoulders into a powerful batting stance and follow through.
qz_baseball_swing.canonical: A person stands and swings both arms together from behind the right shoulder across the body to the left side in one powerful horizontal motion.

difficult: Bowl an invisible ball down an imaginary lane.
Step forward swing your arm back and release a phantom bowling ball.
Approach the line and roll a heavy ball toward unseen pins.
qz_bowl.canonical: A person steps forward with the left foot and swings the right arm back then forward low releasing an imaginary ball toward the ground ahead.
